items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior when running a consolidated report for multiple clients. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces from the simulation of this scenario, making it impossible to confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved or if a failure report was generated. The lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
